title: Cobblemon:Stranger Things
body:
I added a few Pokémon just for fun.
Honestly, I don’t play Pokémon that much — if you have any suggestions, please let me know!

> Added the following Pokémon:
1. Mikriket
2. Cat_fly
3. Mimiku

<details>
<summary>Mikriket</summary>
You could also call this one Super_Kricketune — obviously, it's a super-powered version of Kricketune.
  
![mikricket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7b0cdaffbfebfa2fc4c3e13a8e21a34133d4734.png)

HP: 50
Attack: 150
Defense: 150
Special Attack: 50
Special Defense: 50
Speed: 100
  
Under normal circumstances, the combined form of Hatsune Miku and the Pokémon will be displayed.

![miku](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/691aa3d8ba58f159bf6f0c5b12ba62f548dc3ed1.png)

Evolve Kricketune into Super_Kricketune by leveling up at Lvl 100 with Friendship 200 while using a Nether Star.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cat_fly</summary>
An Eevee evolution made for a friend.
  
![catfly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a1b28e220a778638942d05eb2fde973a2da9ff4.png)

HP: 60
Attack: 60
Defense: 50
Special Attack: 135
Special Defense: 110
Speed: 110

Evolve Eevee into Cat_fly by leveling it up to level 50 with a friendship of 230 while using Rotten Flesh.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mimiku</summary>
Mimikyu + Miku (Incomplete)

![mimiku](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/037734954f467d56d25f0415ffc056e89b8cc094.png)
</details>
